title: Indifi Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Indifi Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Indifi Technologies family as a Full Stack Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Indifi Technologies:
Indifi Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies!
